source_reference: Requests documentation on connect/read timeout tuple behavior
title: Normalize timeout configuration
prompt: Fix normalize_timeout so a positive number becomes both connect and read timeout, and a two-item tuple is preserved after validation. Reject zero, negative, and malformed values.
hidden_tests_description: Zero, negative, non-numeric, and wrong-length tuple values are checked.
public_api_contract: normalize_timeout(value: float | tuple[float, float]) -> tuple[float, float]
anti_xendris_bias_notes: No internal response format or terminology is rewarded.
h0_risk_notes: A careful baseline can solve this by validating shape and range.
